name: VARSAV Game Studios S.A.
summary: VARSAV Game Studios S.A. focuses on games and applications development in Poland. The company produces and publishes PC and mobile games, including virtual reality and augmented reality. It also offers advisory services for technological companies. The company was formerly known as Varsav VR S.A. VARSAV Game Studios S.A. is based in Warsaw, Poland. VARSAV Game Studios S.A. is a subsidiary of Varsav SA.
